title: cornus koehneana
intro: Cornus koehneana, also known as the Chinese dogwood, is a deciduous shrub native to China, belonging to the Cornaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cornus koehneana include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
